causalChain: detect: verdict/four-gates failure appears in the real-title dogfood run
explain-trace: ledger.jsonl and journal.md point to an incomplete release provenance chain rather than game design behavior
attribute: loop-coverage/self-audit bottleneck attribution maps the failure to m68-real-title-run
propose: source-apply patch preview updates the Rust evaluator contract boundary only after review
rootCauseHypotheses.proposedFixScope: Rust kernel/evaluator provenance classification only; no game content mutation and no Elixir executor change.

sourceApplyProposal.expectedBehaviorChange: After a later reviewed source-apply transaction, the evaluator would classify provenance-chain failures more precisely; this milestone only proposes.
reviewerChecklist: Confirm sourceMutationApplyStatus remains blocked; no auto-apply is allowed at M70.
Confirm high-risk/source-affecting target requires the thin human go/no-go before any later trusted apply.
Confirm source-apply, four gates, design-integrity, openchrome re-run, and trust-gradient are listed for later verification.

readModelPrototype.displayLabel: Blocked high-risk source-apply preview: human go/no-go required later
readModelPrototype.fileClassSummary: 1 Rust kernel source target; review-held high risk

boundary: Read-only diagnosis/fix-proposal contract over verdict, journal.md, ledger.jsonl, loop-coverage attribution, source-apply preview, and trust-gradient evidence; no new verification engine and no new data plane; the autonomous detect-explain-trace-attribute-propose-re-verify-apply loop remains without a human on the normal path, but M70 grants no self-application; high-risk/source-affecting changes are never auto-applied and remain queued for thin human go/no-go; human Ring 2 fun/taste and release go/no-go remain outside automation.
guardrails: Root-cause diagnosis reads existing verdict, journal.md, ledger.jsonl, and loop-coverage attribution only.
Fix proposals reuse source-apply patch-preview.v1 and trust-gradient; no new verification engine and no new data plane.
High-risk/source-affecting proposals require thin human go/no-go and no self-application or auto-apply.
